subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! The All-Glorious hath come, and the Son set forth unto the place of sacrifice and returned not, having offered up His spirit and all He possessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل قد اتی الجلیل و الابن قصد مقر الفدآء و ما رجع و انفق روحه و ما عنده
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the concourse on high
